summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of the 5 songs per 30-minute window feature. All 14 new tests passed (queue song limit feature) and all 19 existing battle system tests also pass. Total: 33/33 tests passing.
passed_tests: Queue status without check-in shows proper message
Adding song without check-in returns 400 error
Valid QR code check-in works correctly
Duplicate check-in is blocked (returns already_checked_in: true)
Invalid venue code is rejected with 400 error
First song can be added after check-in
User can add exactly 5 songs in a window
6th song is blocked with proper error message showing minutes until reset
Queue status shows correct data after check-in
Queue status updates after adding songs
Queue status shows proper reason when limit reached
Message to admin field works correctly
Existing user royaltest queue status returns valid data
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is clean and follows best practices
Proper timezone handling with America/Chicago and 4AM cutoff
Window calculation correctly uses check-in time as the anchor
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from responses
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_queue_song_limit.py - Created 14 comprehensive tests for queue song limit feature
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users for queue limit testing (auto-cleanup via unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Queue song limit feature fully tested. 5 songs per 30-minute window works correctly. Check-in is required before adding songs. Window resets every 30 minutes based on check-in timestamp. Existing user royaltest@example.com has already added 5 songs - use new test users for fresh testing.

features_verified.GET /api/queue/my-status: Working - returns all queue status info including songs_this_window, songs_remaining, window_resets_in
features_verified.POST /api/checkin/{venue_code}: Working - QR code check-in required before adding songs
features_verified.check_in_required_for_queue: Working - returns 400 if not checked in
features_verified.5_song_limit: Working - blocks 6th song with helpful error message
features_verified.window_reset_info: Working - response includes minutes until next window
